Hero.subtitle: Registered Animal Welfare Philanthropic Association
Hero.headline: ANIMAL RIGHTS ACTIVISTS OF THE WORLD, UNITE!
Hero.subheadline: (with the virtual WASP card in your phone's wallet)

MembershipForm.heading: Get your WASP Card

pricing.freeDescription: if you're a member, volunteer, or activist of any animal welfare organization
pricing.paidDescription: for 1 year, if you sign up directly as a WASP member, with no organization

MembershipForm.explanation: The card is delivered instantly to your Apple/Google Wallet. No phone number or personal data required: just an email, only to verify you're not a bot.

organization.label: Organization Code or Name / City
organization.placeholder: E.g. WASP-1234 or Organization Name, City

info.nicknameRules: The nickname can't contain profanity, hate speech, or racism.
info.organizationNotFound: If you can't find your organization, message WASP to have it added.
info.emailMatching: To protect your anonymity and that of others, the same email must also be shared with your organization for matching purposes: two different emails will prevent the card from being issued.

qrCode.caption: Sign-up is mobile-only - scan the QR CODE with your phone if you're on a PC/Tablet

cta.text: IF YOU DON'T BELONG TO ANY ANIMAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION, SIGN UP FOR WASP (always 1 minute) AND GET YOUR WASP CARD RIGHT AWAY
